## Checklist
- [ ] My code/documentation follows the structural style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have verified that any provided Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) block uses strict target exclusions rather than disabling rules globally.
- [ ] I have removed all sensitive infrastructure details, authorization keys, corporate IP addresses, and customer payloads from the logs or code snippets.
- [ ] I have checked to ensure no duplicate guides or open pull requests address this exact same rule scenario.
